title: She Learned About Sailors
writer: William M. Conselman, Henry Johnson, Randall Faye
actors: Lew Ayres, Alice Faye, Harry Green
plot: Shanghai nightclub singer Jean falls in love to a sailor, but after his ship left Shanghai, he is of the opinion that he cannot support her in the States, so he writes her in a letter, that he will not see her again, but two pract...
